LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT DOES NOT HAVE THE MOVING PAPERS AND PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE MOTION FILED APRIL 9, 2013. PLAINTIFF DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER OF MAY 20, 2013 THAT REQUIRED PLAINTIFF TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON APRIL 9, 2013. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK SERVED FEB-04-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MADRUGA, PHYLLIS

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY 20, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 10, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Off Calendar

Mtn For Judgmnt On The Pleadings; Ntc Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Jul-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: no appearances by parties or legal representative of the parties. Present in court is ms. gail bechard.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK's Motion For Judgmnt On The Pleadings is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Amended Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joseph M. Nykodym, Esq. of the Law Office of Joseph M. Nykodym, Tel. 925.262.7045, specially appearing for the plaintiff;
Gail Bechael, daughter of plaintiff Phyllis Madruga, was present in court.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Off calendar. The Court does not have the moving papers and proof of service of the motion filed April 9, 2013. Plaintiff did not comply with the Court's order of May 20, 2013 that required Plaintiff to deliver courtesy copies of the motion and proof of service filed on April 9, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-17-2013 Off Calendar

Amended Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-20-2013 Continued To May-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK's Amended Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to May 28, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. GE Capital Bank is required to deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers filed April 9, 2013 to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 20, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued on the court's own motion to May 20, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give GE Capital Retail Bank the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. GE Capital Retail Bank must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 10, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
